pages.text: The $(item)Chorus Forest Skyseed$() — your own corner of the End highlands. Plant it for an end-stone island studded with $(item)chorus plants$() and veined with $(item)purpur$(), an $(item)enderman$() pack roaming it.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)The void End has no wild chorus — so throw a $(item)Forest$() or $(item)Lush$() seed here first: its end-stone island grows $(item)chorus$() to harvest. Ring that $(item)chorus fruit$() with $(item)end stone$() to craft this, and after that it's renewable — your own chorus never runs out.

$(bold)The economy$()$(br)Chorus plants regrow, so the island is a renewable farm. $(item)Chorus fruit$() is teleport-food; smelt it to $(item)popped chorus fruit$() → $(item)purpur$(). The resident $(item)endermen$() drop $(item)ender pearls$() (Eyes of Ender, the Return Portal Seed), and the odd $(item)shulker$() that drifts in drops a $(item)shell$() — slowly stocking the purpur + shells for your first $(item)End City$().
